name: M C Bank & Trust Company
description_short: M C Bank & Trust Company is a community-focused regional bank offering personal and business checking, savings, CDs, and online banking services with routing number 065400483.
description_long:
M C Bank & Trust Company operates as a community-founded and community-operated regional bank with deep roots in local markets. The bank emphasizes a "hometown" approach to banking, positioning itself as more than a traditional financial institution but as a partner in customer growth. Leadership, including President & CEO Christopher P. LeBato, emphasizes serving clients, supporting staff, and living company values as core to the bank's mission.

M C Bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking products divided into personal and business segments. Personal services include checking accounts (Hometown Value and Hometown Traditions NOW), savings accounts, money market accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), and IRA accounts, plus a Christmas Club product. Business services mirror these offerings with commercial analysis checking, business checking, business savings, and commercial money market accounts. The bank also provides digital-first solutions including 24/7 online banking, online bill pay, eStatements, and treasury management services for business customers. QuickBooks integration via Web Connect is available for business banking customers.

M C Bank distinguishes itself through active community involvement and local engagement. The bank runs community scholarship programs, education initiatives, participates in local organizations, and features artist spotlights at banking centers as part of its "Sharing the Hometown Spirit" campaign. The company positions community support as integral to its identity, with staff participation in local events. Their digital services are positioned as time-saving conveniences that complement rather than replace local banking relationships.

As a regional community bank, M C Bank is best suited for customers seeking personalized service and community connection rather than the broadest product selection or most competitive rates. The website provides limited information on specific interest rates, fees, or competitive product details. The bank's marketing emphasizes relationship and values over detailed financial product specifications, which may indicate a traditional banking approach rather than a fintech-forward model. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal Checking (Hometown Value and Hometown Traditions NOW accounts)
Certificates of Deposit (CDs) for personal and business
Business Checking (Commercial Analysis and Hometown Business Checking)
Online Banking (24/7 access, balance checking, transfer, transaction history, cleared check images)
Online Bill Pay (24/7 bill payment scheduling)
pros: 24/7 online banking and bill pay services with free access for customers
QuickBooks integration via Web Connect for business customers to streamline accounting
Community-focused bank with active scholarship programs, education initiatives, and local organization partnerships
Multiple account types for both personal and business needs including CDs, money market, and IRA accounts
eStatements service providing anytime digital access to account statements
Local physical banking centers with staff participation in community events
Treasury management services available for business customers
cons: Limited information on website regarding specific interest rates, APYs, or fee structures for comparison
No mention of mobile app features or mobile banking capabilities beyond web-based online banking
Regional/community bank model may mean fewer physical locations and less extensive ATM network than national banks
Website does not mention insurance products, investment services, or loan products beyond basic savings vehicles
No pricing transparency for business services like treasury management or analysis checking accounts
best_for: Customers in M C Bank's local communities who value personal relationships and community involvement
Small business owners seeking business checking, savings, and treasury management services
Individuals looking for basic personal banking products (checking, savings, CDs) with local customer service
Community-minded customers who prioritize supporting locally-operated financial institutions
diagnosis: M C Bank is best for customers in its local service areas who prioritize community connection, personalized service, and local bank relationships over maximum product selection or rate competitiveness. The main caveat is that specific product details, rates, fees, and loan offerings are not detailed on the website, requiring direct contact to evaluate competitive positioning against larger regional or national banks.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: M C Bank & Trust Company is a regional bank offering personal and business checking, savings, CDs, and online banking.
